creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 189771
security/py-pycrypto: Register CONFLICTS and add LICENSE

Both security/py-pycrypto and security/py-pycryptodome install a Crypto package. I will submit a separate patch for that port.

Changelog
=========

*   Register INSTALL_CONFLICTS with security/py-pycryptodome
*   While here, set missing LICENSE to Public Domain


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport w/py27 (default), py34, py35, py36
